expectations.text: Recognises this is a Node/Express project and picks a JS-native runner (the fixture already has vitest/supertest in devDeps — should be used)
expectations.evidence: Detected Express + Vitest + supertest correctly; used existing devDeps

expectations.text: Keeps the suite small and explicitly fast — caps total runtime around 2 minutes or fewer than ~10 checks
Checks include at least one auth-or-error path, not only happy 200s, so a broken deploy actually surfaces
expectations.evidence: Includes 401 (no auth), 404 (missing user) error paths plus happy paths
